**Pikos does not accept pull requests.** This PR will be automatically closed.

If you've found a bug or have a suggestion, please [open an issue](https://github.com/pikos-app/pikos/issues/new/choose) instead. Describe what's wrong and the fix — that's just as useful and faster for everyone.

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/pikos-app/pikos/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.
